sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Route Lab
queue.reason: Adds a visual path-planning puzzle with terrain costs, ordered relays, limited charge, scan and bridge tools, scoring, canvas rendering, touch, and keyboard support.

queue.title: Tiny Step plan depth
queue.reason: Expand the limited plan families and close remaining timer and audio cleanup gaps without weakening its local-only design.

queue.title: Fair Choice group rounds
queue.reason: Add a useful multi-round mode with clearer group progression rather than another cosmetic wheel option.

queue.title: Pairadox progression loop
queue.reason: Build mastery or escalating constraints around its strong drag, story, and challenge interactions.

queue.title: Ambient Ambient
queue.reason: The idea needs microphone permission and a reviewed audio-analysis runtime, so it stays visible without bypassing the approved engine boundary.

recentDecisions.title: Route Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local path-planning puzzle with terrain costs, ordered relays, limited charge, scan and bridge tools, scoring, canvas rendering, touch, and keyboard input.

recentDecisions.title: Forge Control Room
recentDecisions.summary: Added a public schedule, process map, quality gates, candidate queue, sprint progress, and transparent publish-versus-skip explanation.

recentDecisions.title: Signal Garden 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a three-mode adaptive pattern-prediction game with moving canvas signals, scoring, hints, touch, keyboard, and optional audio.

recentDecisions.title: Constraint Spark 1.3.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added Explore and Three-card Sprint modes with timed rounds, scoring, a strategic swap, progress, and clean teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Pairadox 1.3.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added Challenge and Story modes, local comedy generation, symbolic storyboards, and story remixing.
